claim: The public demonstration uses a balanced normal/disease raw-count subset.
The NB objective improves during the public-data fit.
Disease-minus-normal state shifts summarize fitted composition differences.
Condition-level state composition is estimated from latent mixture weights.
Cell-level FPI summarizes mixed-state entropy and transition potential.
Cross-sectional state flow is inferred from fitted compositions and state-program cost.
Condition-ordered cell-level latent mixtures show continuous rather than purely discrete state assignments.
